ranu.name: Ranu
ranu.message: A quarter-century is a beautiful milestone, but it's the people who make it truly special. Your presence would mean the world to him.

priya.name: Priya
priya.message: Some people light up the room just by walking in. Dada's silver year simply wouldn't be as bright without you celebrating with us.

khyati.name: Khyati
khyati.message: Twenty-five years, and the stories with you in them are still his favourite ones to tell. Come write the next chapter.

adena.name: Adena
adena.message: From the small moments to the big ones, you've been part of the story. Come celebrate twenty-five years with us.

tibra.name: Tibra
tibra.message: Dada's greatest fortune is the people beside him — and you're one of them. We'd be honoured to have you there.

kriti.name: Kriti
kriti.message: Twenty-five years, and the best chapters all have you in them. Let's add another.

raji.name: Raji
raji.message: The best memories of the last twenty-five years have you in them. Join us as we raise a glass to the next twenty-five.

kelp.name: Kelp
kelp.message: A celebration only feels whole with the right people in the room. For Dada, you're one of them.

sanjeet.name: Sanjeet
sanjeet.message: Through every season of the past twenty-five years, your friendship has been a constant. We can't wait to celebrate this milestone together.

raunaq.name: Raunaq
raunaq.message: From the small moments to the big ones, you've been part of the story. Come celebrate twenty-five years with us.

shailvi.name: Shailvi
shailvi.message: A milestone this significant is meant to be shared with our favorite people. Dada's silver jubilee needs you there to be perfect.

pranat.name: Pranat
pranat.message: You've been such a meaningful part of the journey so far. Come help us ring in a quarter-century in style.

nush.name: Nush
nush.message: Twenty-five years of life, laughter, and love. Your spirit is exactly what this celebration needs to feel complete.

adi.name: Adi
adi.message: Some friendships define a lifetime. Dada's twenty-fifth year celebration wouldn't be the same without you standing with us.

maa.name: माँ
maa.message: A celebration only feels whole with the right people in the room. For Dada, you're one of them.

didi.name: Didi
didi.message: A celebration only feels whole with the right people in the room. For Dada, you're one of them.

verona.name: Verona
verona.message: A celebration only feels whole with the right people in the room. For Dada, you're one of them.

tusu.name: Tusu
tusu.message: A celebration only feels whole with the right people in the room. For Dada, you're one of them.

aish.name: Aish
aish.message: Every great celebration needs the right souls to bring it to life. We would be absolutely thrilled to have you join Dada's silver jubilee.

divya.name: Divya Di
divya.message: A celebration only feels whole with the right people in the room. For Dada, you're one of them.

eeshika.name: Eeshika Di
eeshika.message: A celebration only feels whole with the right people in the room. For Dada, you're one of them.

sanya.name: Sanya Di
sanya.message: A celebration only feels whole with the right people in the room. For Dada, you're one of them.
